data.description:
Johns Lyng Group Ltd ( (AU:JLG) ) just unveiled an announcement.

data.title: Banco Comercial Português to Early Redeem EUR450 Million Notes
data.description:
An announcement from Banco Comercial Portugues ( (GB:0RJN) ) is now available.

Banco Comercial Português, S.A. has announced its decision to early redeem its EUR450 million Subordinated Fixed Rate Reset Notes, originally due in 2030. data.title: JPMorgan Chase & Co. Ceases to be a Substantial Holder in Evolution Mining
data.description:
Evolution Mining Limited ( (AU:EVN) ) has provided an update.

JPMorgan Chase & Co. and its affiliates have ceased to be substantial holders in Evolution Mining Limited as of March 6, 2025. This change in holdings may influence the company’s market dynamics and stakeholder interests, as JPMorgan’s involvement in securities lending and investment management has been significant.

More about Evolution Mining Limited

Evolution Mining Limited is a prominent company in the mining industry, primarily focused on the exploration and production of gold. The company operates several gold mines across Australia and has a significant market presence in the gold mining sector.

data.title: Kawasaki Kisen Kaisha Completes Treasury Stock Cancellation
data.description:
Kawasaki Kisen Kaisha ( (JP:9107) ) has shared an announcement.

Kawasaki Kisen Kaisha, Ltd. (“K” LINE) has completed the cancellation of 36,000,000 shares of its treasury stock, which represents 5.33% of the total shares outstanding before cancellation. This move, resolved by the Board of Directors, is part of a share repurchase plan initiated in November 2024, aimed at enhancing shareholder value and optimizing the company’s capital structure.

More about Kawasaki Kisen Kaisha

Kawasaki Kisen Kaisha, Ltd. (“K” LINE) operates in the shipping and logistics industry, providing maritime transportation services. The company focuses on sustainability and environmental management as part of its corporate strategy.

data.title: Sydbank Initiates DKK 1.35 Billion Share Buyback Program
data.description:
Sydbank A/S ( (GB:0MGE) ) has provided an announcement.

Sydbank A/S has initiated a share buyback program worth DKK 1,350 million, which commenced on March 3, 2025, and is set to conclude by January 31, 2026. The program aims to reduce the company’s share capital and is conducted under the EU’s Safe Harbour regulations. During the first week of the program, Sydbank repurchased 63,000 shares for a total transaction value of DKK 27,961,010. These transactions were executed by Danske Bank A/S on behalf of Sydbank. Following these transactions, Sydbank holds a total of 3,448,200 own shares, representing 6.31% of the bank’s share capital.

More about Sydbank A/S

Sydbank A/S is a financial services company based in Denmark, primarily engaged in providing banking services. The company operates within the financial industry, focusing on offering a range of banking products and services to its clients.

data.title: NEPI Rockcastle Offers Dividend Options with Tax Implications
data.description:
NEPI Rockcastle Plc ( (DE:0A3) ) has issued an update.

NEPI Rockcastle Plc, a company incorporated in the Netherlands, has announced a final dividend for the six months ended 31 December 2024, allowing shareholders to choose between a capital repayment or a cash dividend. The capital repayment option is tax-efficient for South African shareholders, while the cash dividend option involves Dutch and South African withholding taxes, with specific implications for U.S. shareholders.
